subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to identify publishers with declining quarterly spend trends in 2024 (Q1 > Q2 > Q3 > Q4 or similar declining pattern). Return publisher ID, name, and quarterly spend amounts.

Reconcile publisher decline data with contract status, historical renewal patterns, and market positioning. For each declining publisher, classify renewal posture and generate recommendation (hold, expand, reduce) based on trend severity, contract value at risk, and strategic importance.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) sql_gen (mid tier) to fetch publishers with declining Q1-Q4 2024 trends — multi-quarter windowed aggregation across spend tables justifies mid tier; (2) cross_recon (mid tier) to reconcile decline trends with contract metadata and generate hold/expand/reduce recommendations — classification and posture decision are inherent to cross_recon, not a separate policy_action, because the query does not ask for compliance or governance approval, just business recommendations. No separate policy_action needed. No multitool_plan needed — the work is contained within SQL and business logic.

output.sql: WITH quarterly AS (SELECT publisher, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=1 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q1, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=2 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q2, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=3 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q3, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=4 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q4 FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY publisher) SELECT publisher AS publisher_id, publisher AS publisher_name, q1, q2, q3, q4 FROM quarterly WHERE q1 > q2 AND q2 > q3 AND q3 > q4 ORDER BY (q1 - q4) DESC

reconciled.note: Cannot execute reconciliation - no MongoDB operational state provided

required_data.mongodb_source: current publisher contracts, renewal dates, contract values, strategic tier
required_data.missing: MongoDB query output with operational contract state

reconciliation_logic.step1: LEFT JOIN mongo contracts ON sql.publisher_id = mongo.publisher_id
reconciliation_logic.step3: Classify by: contract_value_at_risk * decline_severity + strategic_tier weight
reconciliation_logic.step4: Recommendation: reduce if (decline>30% AND value_at_risk>high), hold if (decline<15%), expand if (strategic_tier=1 AND reversible_decline)

output.error: MongoDB operational state required - received only SQL historical query definition
